title: A Strange Alliance
lines: You carefully toss the vacuum-sealed block of cheese into the center of the rat swarm.
They swarm it instantly. But surprisingly, instead of attacking you, the largest rat looks at you, and gestures with its head down a side corridor.
They seem far too intelligent. The rats start moving, leaving a clear path. One points its nose toward a trail of strange, pulsing glowing goo on the floor.

options.desc: Follow the trail of glowing goo
